title: It's Not Enough to Be Nice!

text_block_list.name: Palmer & Helios
text_block_list.text: Help us, Miss Ines!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Hoo boy. I'm guessing it's study troubles again?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Yesss! If I flunk this test, I'll have to take extra
classes!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
No cap, I'm feeling pressed here! The whole
situation's high-key hectic!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Well, I'm happy to help you with your studies,
but... Hm.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: ...Okay.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: I'll help you two out, but on one condition.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Sure! Anything you say! Just lay it on us!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I want you to look through the textbook and try
to guess which questions are going to come up in
the test!

text_block_list.name: Palmer & Helios
text_block_list.text: Huh?!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
That's a yikes! I don't even remember what kinda
questions the last test had!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I'm not budging on this, okay? I have work and
training to do, so I can't just teach you
everything.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Palmster, it's time to pop off!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Okay! I mean, we'll be taking up some of your,
like, precious time, so we should make sure we do
this properly!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A few days later, when I drop by the library to do
some research...

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Gahhh?! My work's not braining! Every question
looks just like the last one!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Totally. It's like they're just taking the same numbers and symbols and... shuffling them around...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Wait, Helios! All these problems are literally the
same format! You can solve them all exactly the
same way! So that means...

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Teach must love this type of question! It's like
they're in a super-sticky situationship. No cap,
we're low-key detectives for figuring that out!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Like, yes! So now we just gotta find more
questions to test ourselves on!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Using their own brand of trial and error, the two
work hard to meet "Miss" Ines's conditions. Then,
a few days later...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
That was such a tasty meal! By the way, I've got
some free time after this, Trainer, so—

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Ines! There you are! Are you down for a quick yap
sesh?

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
So, about the potential exam questions—the two
of us gave it a serious think, for real!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Right.
So, what questions are you expecting?

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
The second question on page forty... and
questions five to ten on page fifty-two! What do
you think?!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Oh, wow. So why did you pick these?

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Well, when we checked our notes from class,
there were these highlighted bits, right? Like,
they were giving rainbow with all the different
colors we used. ☆

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
And I was like, "Wait, what are these colors even
for?" but then I remembered we're supposed to
watch out for trick questions!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Teach stans those really complicated ones, right?
But if we just remember the formula, we can stay
on point!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Yep, yep. So, you remember the formula now?
Okay, so... Are there any questions you couldn't
figure out?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Let's see... Huh?

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
There kinda aren't?! I get them all! That's wild. So
we were galaxy-brained the whole time?!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Wow. Well, that's a shame. I had some tips and
tricks ready for you and everything.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, I'm high-key sorry about this! But if you
ever feel like you don't understand the
assignment, Ines, just @ me! ♪

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Hehe, what a handful.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Me too. Their hard work really paid off there.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, they would've gotten there faster if I'd
taught them that stuff right away.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
But that wouldn't have helped them in the long
run. Still...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Judging from their attitude at the end there, I'm
sure they'll be fine—even if I'm not around to help
next time.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Hehe, what a reliefy-lief. Problem solved. ♪
choice_data_list:
Do you feel a little sad that they won't need
your help?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Hehe, what a reliefy-lief. Problem solved. ♪
choice_data_list:
Do you feel a little sad that they won't need
your help?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Oh? Are you trying to study my teaching skills?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
You don't need to do that! Everyone has their
own way of doing things.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Besides, I'm pretty fond of the way you teach. ♪

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Yeahhh, there is that. It's like they're flying the nest.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I wonder how I'll fare when it's my sisters' turn...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Scratch that! This is what growing up is all about!
If anything, I should be happy!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I've got to ready myself for when that day
inevitably comes!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Knowing that her big sister duties won't last
forever, Ines Fujin braces herself for the future.
